Trulioo was founded in Vancouver in 2011 and takes a different shape from most of its peers. Rather than running its own document-and-face verification stack end to end, Trulioo operates as a global identity data network — aggregating government registries, credit bureaus, utility data, and other primary sources, and exposing them through a single API for KYC and KYB queries.

The platform sits closer to the data-and-orchestration layer than to the flow-and-UX layer. The customer base is enterprise, with deployments in banking, payments, and large fintechs that want one contract for global identity data coverage. Pricing is custom, typically per query.
